name: Barman Simulator
short_description: Take charge of your bar in Barman Simulator! Serve cocktails, manage inventory, and deal with thieves. Hire staff, decorate your establishment to your liking, and attract crowds with exciting activities. Make your bar the hottest spot in town!
detailed_description: Take charge of your very own bar in Barman Simulator! Craft unique cocktails, serve your customers with speed and precision, and keep a close eye on your inventory to ensure you never run out of stock. But that's not all—face daily challenges like dealing with thieves and managing the rush of peak hours. Hire and train a team of employees to help you keep things running smoothly. Customize your establishment by decorating it to reflect your personal style and offer exciting activities to draw in larger crowds. Turn your bar into the hottest spot in town!
about_the_game: Take charge of your very own bar in Barman Simulator! Customize your establishment by decorating it to reflect your personal style and offer exciting activities to draw in larger crowds. Turn your bar into the hottest spot in town!
supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
